mano_cua.result_summary: 账号注册成功但JWT会话解密失败(JWEDecryptionFailed)，登录后仍重定向至signin页面，所有受保护功能无法访问，list:搜索语法无法测试。/api/auth/session确认用户已登录，但Server Components和tRPC API均返回401。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: JWT session token decryption failed (JWEDecryptionFailed). User registration succeeded and /api/auth/session returns valid user info, but Next.js Server Components cannot decrypt the JWE token, causing all protected pages to redirect to /signin. The list: search syntax feature cannot be tested due to authentication barrier.
